channel.title: Dropout.tv - Very Important People
channel.description: Latest releases from Dropout.tv: Very Important People

item.title: Last Looks: Claude McCaw - Very Important People
item.description:
Tamar Levine, Alex Perrone, and Bruce Spaulding Fuller talk about how Alex Song-Xia transformed into Claude McCaw.

Duration: 05:02

Tags: Very Important People, vic michaelis, disguises, makeup, makeovers, interviews, improv, surprises, tamar levine, alex perrone, bruce spaulding fuller, alex song-xia, behind the scenes

item.title: Claude McCaw - Very Important People
item.description:
Vic interviews Claude McCaw (Alex Song-Xia) and discusses their evil business, McCaw Industries.

Duration: 13:22

Tags: Very Important People, vic michaelis, disguises, makeup, makeovers, interviews, improv, surprises, alex song-xia

item.title: Last Looks: Jordache - Very Important People
item.description:
Tamar Levine, Alex Perrone, and Bruce Spaulding Fuller talk about how Echo Kellum transformed into Jordache.

Duration: 04:18

Tags: Very Important People, vic michaelis, disguises, makeup, makeovers, interviews, improv, surprises, tamar levine, alex perrone, bruce spaulding fuller, echo kellum, behind the scenes

item.title: Jordache - Very Important People
item.description:
Vic interviews Jordache (Echo Kellum), an Atlantean looking for love on the surface world.

Duration: 21:13

Tags: Very Important People, vic michaelis, disguises, makeup, makeovers, interviews, improv, surprises, echo kellum
